name: Carbon Reduction
description: Reduce overall greenhouse gas emissions from operations.

name: Zero Waste
description: Minimize waste generated and maximize recycling/composting.

name: Water Conservation
description: Optimize water usage efficiency and recycle wastewater.

name: Renewable Energy
description: Transition energy consumption to solar wind or clean sources.

name: Resource Efficiency
description: Optimize usage of fuel materials and electricity in operations.
